choices.text: Ask where they were
Ask what they saw
Probe the timeline
Challenge their alibi
Ask about their connection to the victim
Ask about the suspect's recent behavior
Press on the contradictions
Suggest you understand why it happened

nodes.text: I was around {place} that evening. Did not go far.

choices.text: Where exactly?
Were you alone?

nodes.text: Inside {place} the whole time. Never left. I had the television on. I remember that clearly.
Alone, yes. No one to verify it. I know how that sounds, but I cannot manufacture a witness for you.
I saw {suspect} near {place} {time_phrase}. Kept their head down. I did not think much of it at the time.

choices.text: What exactly were they doing?
Are you certain it was them?

nodes.text: Moving quickly. Not running, but not casual either. The kind of pace someone uses when they want to be somewhere else.
I know what I saw. The light was on. I was not far away. I have no reason to lie to you about this.
It was {time_phrase}. I heard something. A sound I could not place. I told myself it was nothing.

choices.text: How precise is that estimate?
What were you doing at that time?

nodes.text: I checked my watch. {time_phrase}, I am sure of it. I was waiting for someone who never arrived. You tend to watch the clock in those situations.
I was inside {place}. Reading. Or trying to. I heard the sound outside and I just sat there. I am not proud of that.
I was at {place} that evening. The whole time. I do not see why that is a problem.

choices.text: Can anyone confirm that?
That does not cover the full window.

nodes.text: You can ask around. Someone must have seen me there. I was not hiding. I had no reason to hide.
I stepped out. Briefly. I do not remember the exact time. Five minutes, maybe ten. Are you saying that matters?
I knew them. Not well. The kind of acquaintance where you nod in passing and do not ask questions.

choices.text: Was the relationship tense?
When did you last speak to them?

nodes.text: We had our difficulties. That is private. Every relationship has difficulties. It does not make me a suspect.
A week ago, maybe. We exchanged a few words near {place}. Nothing significant. Or at least, I did not think so then.
{suspect} seemed different lately. I noticed it but I did not say anything. Not my place.

choices.text: Different how? Be specific.
Were they under pressure from someone?

nodes.text: Distracted. Startled at small things. Like they were waiting for something bad to happen. I thought it was personal trouble.
Someone, or something. They would not say. But they stopped coming around {place} the way they used to. Started avoiding people.
I am telling you what I know. I do not know what you think you have, but I am not changing my account.

choices.text: Your story does not match what others told us.
Think carefully before you answer again.

nodes.text: Then someone else is lying. It is not me. I have told you the same thing three times. What do you need to hear?
I may have the time wrong. I was not counting minutes. But what I saw, what I heard — that part is accurate.
What are you suggesting exactly?

choices.text: That the victim may have pushed someone past their limit.
That circumstances can back a person into a corner.
That someone may have been trying to protect another person.
That this may not have been intended to go this far.

nodes.text: I will not say they deserved it. But I will say this — not everyone treated them with much decency. There were grievances. Real ones.
I do not know what they were into. Money, maybe. Obligations they could not meet. People make decisions when they are desperate that they would never make otherwise.
If someone did this to keep another person safe... I do not know. I would need to understand the whole picture before I said anything more.
Is that what you think happened? It is possible. Though it did not look like an accident from where I was standing. But I could be wrong.
